items.title: How elite US teams tackle combat rescue missions
items.dek: Air force pararescue units who specialise in CSAR missions are among the most highly trained in the US military.

items.title: Unanswered questions remain after death of Australia's most wanted fugitive
items.dek: Double-murderer Dezi Freeman evaded capture for seven months in the bush but police believe he had help.

items.title: Artemis II crew take 'spectacular' image of Earth
items.dek: The snap was taken aboard the Orion capsule by its commander, Reid Wiseman, as the crew head towards the Moon.
